hook.on-activate:
export PATH="$PWD/target/debug:$PATH"

  # install pre-commit hook if in a git repo
  if [ -d .git ] && [ -f hooks/pre-commit ]; then
    ln -sf ../../hooks/pre-commit .git/hooks/pre-commit
  fi
